_meta.purpose: Bridges an SVTM 'vegForm' (Keith 2004 formation) to the exact PBP BAL-table formation key used in pbp_bal_tables.json.
_meta.match_method: Sort rules by 'priority' (ascending). First rule whose 'match_keyword' is a substring of the vegForm wins.
_meta.null_handling: pbp_formation = null means 'no reliable mapping'. The engine must substitute worst-case 'Forest (...)' AND set requires_manual_review = true. null is NOT the same as 'no vegetation found' (that is handled upstream by vegetation_found = False -> BAL-LOW).
_meta.default_if_no_match: Forest (wet/dry sclerophyll; incl Coastal Swamp Forest, Pine Plantations, Sub-Alpine Woodland)
_meta.default_note: Unmatched vegForm -> Forest row (worst case) AND requires_manual_review = true.
_meta.pct_override_note: Rules with requires_pct_override = true cannot be fully resolved from vegForm alone (e.g. Coastal Swamp Forest sits inside the Forested Wetlands formation but belongs in 'Forest' under PBP). A future PCT/class-level check should override these.
_meta.alpine_note: Alpine Complex only exists in the FDI 50 table. If it appears with FDI 80/100, the engine should fall back to the Forest row + manual_review (do NOT crash).
_meta.status: DRAFT v2 - manual_review rows need bushfire/ecology sign-off before non-screening use.

rules.note: No reliable classification -> engine uses worst-case Forest until reviewed. (Normally never reached: handled upstream by vegetation_found=False.)

rules.pbp_formation: Forest (wet/dry sclerophyll; incl Coastal Swamp Forest, Pine Plantations, Sub-Alpine Woodland)

rules.note: Coastal Swamp Forest subset belongs in 'Forest' under PBP - override at PCT/class level.
Sedge/reed wetland - some are low-threat exclusions. Verify.
Includes mallee per PBP. Verify per PCT.
Keith 'Heathlands' does NOT split tall vs short; defaulted to Tall Heath (conservative). Verify height/structure for Tall vs Short.
Alpine Complex only in FDI 50 table; fall back to Forest + review if FDI != 50.
